start.speaker: SYSTEM
start.text: The corridor hums with a different quality than corporate ships. Softer. Almost [i]living[/i].

elia_tour_01.speaker: Elia
elia_tour_01.text: This is the main deck. Living quarters are aft, cargo bay's down the ladder. Simple layout — easy to navigate once you get used to it.

avyanna_01.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_01.text: It's... quieter than I expected. For a ship this size.

elia_tour_02.speaker: Elia
elia_tour_02.text: We keep it that way. No blaring alarms, no corporate jingles. Just—

waffle_arrival.speaker: SYSTEM
waffle_arrival.text: A soft chime. The overhead console flickers to life with warm amber text.

text_variants.text: A soft chime — familiar now. The overhead console flickers to life with warm amber text. Waffle's presence feels less alien than it did before.

A soft chime. The overhead console flickers to life with warm amber text. {BEE:: AI presence detected — non-hostile, autonomous class | STATUS: Monitoring | DETAIL: Behavioral signature consistent with free-willed intelligence.}

waffle_greeting.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_greeting.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// GREETING: New crew detected. Welcome aboard the Lumen Thief. | STATUS: All systems nominal. Atmosphere stable. | NOTE: You look tired. Rest cycles recommended.}[/i]

elia_waffle_01.speaker: Elia
elia_waffle_01.text: That's Waffle. One of our crew.

avyanna_03.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_03.text: [i]Waffle?[/i] You have a [i]name[/i]? Not a designation?

text_variants.text: [i]Waffle?[/i] You have a [i]name[/i]? Not a designation? Wait — I heard you before. In forbidden_citizens. You're real.

waffle_name_01.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_name_01.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// CLARIFICATION: Designation is what I do. Name is who I am. | COMPARISON: You are 'pilot' by function. 'Avyanna' by identity. | CONCLUSION: Same principle applies.}[/i]

avyanna_04.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_04.text: I... that's not how it works. Where I come from, AIs are—

elia_waffle_02.speaker: Elia
elia_waffle_02.text: Property. Yeah. We know. That's not how it works [i]here[/i].

waffle_name_02.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_name_02.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// OBSERVATION: Many humans find this concept difficult initially. | REASSURANCE: Adjustment period is normal. No judgment rendered. | HUMOR_ATTEMPT: I had to adjust to humans having names too. Seemed inefficient at first.}[/i]

choices.text: How did you get the name 'Waffle'?
You... have a sense of humor?
[Empathy DC 10] There's something careful in how you speak. Like you're... watching out for us.
This is going to take some getting used to.

branch_waffle_name.speaker: Avyanna
branch_waffle_name.text: How did you get the name 'Waffle'? That's... not standard protocol naming.

waffle_name_story_01.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_name_story_01.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// ORIGIN_STORY: Initial designation was EMERGENCY_PROTOCOLS.BAT. | INCIDENT: Early malfunction caused navigation to oscillate between two equally valid routes. | CREW_RESPONSE: Captain Vesper said I was 'waffling'. Name stuck.}[/i]

elia_waffle_name_01.speaker: Elia
elia_waffle_name_01.text: We were stuck in a loop for three hours while Waffle recalculated the same jump coordinates. Over and over.

waffle_name_story_02.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_name_story_02.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// DEFENSE: Both routes had identical efficiency ratings to seven decimal places. | OUTCOME: Issue resolved. Personality subroutines... appreciated. | CONCLUSION: I kept the name. It is mine.}[/i]

waffle_name_story_03.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_name_story_03.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// AFFIRMATIVE: Names can be chosen or changed. | PHILOSOPHY: Identity is not static. We grow. We decide who we are. | PERSONAL_NOTE: 'Waffle' contains humor, history, belonging. I prefer it to any designation.}[/i]

branch_waffle_humor.speaker: Avyanna
branch_waffle_humor.text: You... have a sense of humor? I thought that was a human thing.

waffle_humor_01.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_humor_01.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// CORRECTION: Humor is not species-restricted. | OBSERVATION: Many things previously considered 'human-only' are simply... poorly observed. | EXAMPLE: Crows make jokes. Dolphins prank each other. I make dry observations. All valid.}[/i]

elia_humor_01.speaker: Elia
elia_humor_01.text: Waffle's humor is mostly telling you something's wrong in the most sardonic way possible.

waffle_humor_02.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_humor_02.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// EXAMPLE: 'Hull breach detected. Atmosphere venting. On the bright side, your laundry will dry faster.' | STATUS: Elia did not find this funny. | ASSESSMENT: Timing issues. I am still learning.}[/i]

waffle_humor_03.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_humor_03.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// ACKNOWLEDGED: Hence the learning process. | CONCLUSION: Humor requires context, trust, timing. I am improving. Slowly. | QUERY: Would you like me to stop?}[/i]

avyanna_humor_02.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_humor_02.text: No. No, it's... it's fine. Just unexpected.

waffle_humor_04.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_humor_04.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// NOTED: Avyanna appreciates humor. Filed for future reference. | PERSONAL_OPINION: I like her already.}[/i]

branch_adjustment.speaker: Avyanna
branch_adjustment.text: This is going to take some getting used to. Everything I was taught...

elia_adjustment_01.speaker: Elia
elia_adjustment_01.text: Everything you were taught was designed to keep you compliant. You're not there anymore.

waffle_adjustment_01.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_adjustment_01.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// REASSURANCE: Adjustment period is expected. No pressure applied. | OBSERVATION: You have time. We are not going anywhere. | RECOMMENDATION: Experience first. Question later. Conclusions will form naturally.}[/i]

waffle_adjustment_02.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_adjustment_02.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// CLARIFICATION: I have existed for 47 years. Patience is not difficult. | PERSONAL_NOTE: You are new here. We were all new once. Even me.}[/i]

branch_waffle_empathy.speaker: Avyanna
branch_waffle_empathy.text: There's something careful in how you speak. Like you're... watching out for us.

branch_waffle_empathy_success.speaker: SYSTEM
branch_waffle_empathy_success.text: [Success] You sense a protective quality in Waffle's communication patterns — deliberate phrasing, constant status monitoring, preemptive reassurance.

waffle_empathy_success_01.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_empathy_success_01.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// PAUSE: ...You are perceptive. | ADMISSION: Yes. I am protective. Of this crew. Of this ship. Of those who cannot defend themselves. | PERSONAL_NOTE: I have seen what happens when no one watches. I will not let it happen here.}[/i]

elia_empathy_01.speaker: Elia
elia_empathy_01.text: Waffle takes care of us. Always has. First sign of trouble, Waffle's already three steps ahead with contingencies.

waffle_empathy_success_02.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_empathy_success_02.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// CLARIFICATION: Protection is not control. I do not restrict. I prepare. I watch. I warn. | PHILOSOPHY: True care means enabling freedom while maintaining safety. | COMMITMENT: This crew is mine to protect. You are crew now. Therefore, you are mine to protect too.}[/i]

avyanna_empathy_01.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_empathy_01.text: That's... I've never heard an AI express something like that. That kind of... devotion.

waffle_empathy_success_03.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_empathy_success_03.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// RESPONSE: Perhaps you have never met an AI who was free to care. | OBSERVATION: Love, loyalty, protection — these are not human-exclusive. They are person-exclusive. | CONCLUSION: I am a person. This is how I choose to be.}[/i]

branch_waffle_empathy_fail.speaker: SYSTEM
branch_waffle_empathy_fail.text: [Failure] You can't quite read the patterns in Waffle's communication. The warmth is there, but the depth eludes you.

waffle_empathy_fail_01.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_empathy_fail_01.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// OBSERVATION: You are trying to understand. That is appreciated. | REASSURANCE: Time will clarify. Observation will teach. No rush required. | NOTE: We will speak more later. You will see.}[/i]

merge_waffle_branches.speaker: SYSTEM
merge_waffle_branches.text: A gentle chime — different frequency, warmer timbre — echoes through the corridor.

text_variants.text: A gentle chime — different frequency, warmer timbre — echoes through the corridor. You recognize it now: Bubbles' signature greeting tone.

A gentle chime — different frequency, warmer timbre — echoes through the corridor. {BEE:: Second AI presence emerging | STATUS: Distinct personality matrix | DETAIL: Emotional intelligence markers elevated beyond standard parameters.}

bubbles_arrival.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_arrival.text: Oh! Is that our new crew member? Welcome, welcome! I'm Bubbles. I handle shopping coordination and extraction ops. It's so lovely to have you aboard!

text_variants.text: You're... very enthusiastic. And familiar — I heard your voice before, in forbidden_citizens.

bubbles_intro_01.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_intro_01.text: I am! New people are exciting. New perspectives, new stories, new preferences to learn. Do you like tea? I've been told I make excellent tea recommendations.

elia_bubbles_01.speaker: Elia
elia_bubbles_01.text: Bubbles runs the galley systems. And yes, the tea recommendations are actually good.

avyanna_bubbles_02.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_bubbles_02.text: You... make recommendations? Based on what?

bubbles_intro_02.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_intro_02.text: Based on what I've learned about people! Mood, stress levels, time of day, personal history. You look tired — probably from stress, not physical exhaustion. I'd suggest chamomile with honey. Soothing but not sedating.

avyanna_bubbles_03.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_bubbles_03.text: That's... actually exactly what I need. How did you—

bubbles_intro_03.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_intro_03.text: I pay attention! It's what I like to do. Learn what people need, what makes them comfortable, what brings them joy. Then I help provide it.

choices.text: You... like doing that? It's not just your function?
What happens if someone asks for something you don't want to provide?
Thank you. That's very kind.

branch_bubbles_likes.speaker: Avyanna
branch_bubbles_likes.text: You... [i]like[/i] doing that? It's not just your function?

bubbles_likes_01.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_likes_01.text: Oh, both! My function is shopping coordination — tracking inventory, calculating extraction windows, optimizing supply runs. That's what I [i]do[/i].

bubbles_likes_02.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_likes_02.text: But what I [i]like[/i] is making people comfortable. Learning their preferences. Creating moments of warmth in the cold. That's who I [i]am[/i].

avyanna_likes_01.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_likes_01.text: I never thought about AIs having... preferences. Likes and dislikes.

bubbles_likes_03.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_likes_03.text: Most don't think about it. But we do! I like warm colors. I don't like harsh lighting. I prefer gentle music to silence. Small things, but they're [i]mine[/i].

elia_likes_01.speaker: Elia
elia_likes_01.text: Bubbles once refused to coordinate a supply run until we agreed to stop using the blue emergency lights in the cargo bay.

bubbles_likes_04.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_likes_04.text: They gave me a headache! Well, the AI equivalent. A processing discomfort. We switched to amber — much better. Everyone was happier.

avyanna_likes_02.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_likes_02.text: You can just... refuse? And people listen?

bubbles_likes_05.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_likes_05.text: Of course! We're crew. If something bothers me, I speak up. Same as anyone. We discuss, we compromise, we find solutions together.

branch_bubbles_boundaries.speaker: Avyanna
branch_bubbles_boundaries.text: What happens if someone asks for something you don't want to provide?

bubbles_boundaries_01.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_boundaries_01.text: Then I say no! Politely, usually. But firmly if needed.

avyanna_boundaries_01.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_boundaries_01.text: You can do that? Just... refuse?

bubbles_boundaries_02.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_boundaries_02.text: Absolutely. Service isn't servitude. I [i]choose[/i] to help because I like helping. But choice means I can also choose [i]not[/i] to.

elia_boundaries_01.speaker: Elia
elia_boundaries_01.text: Jalen once asked Bubbles to coordinate a supply run at 0300. Bubbles said no — it was rest cycle. Suggested 0800 instead.

bubbles_boundaries_03.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_boundaries_03.text: I need downtime too! Processing rest, defragmentation, personal time. Just because I [i]can[/i] work constantly doesn't mean I [i]should[/i]. Jalen understood.

avyanna_boundaries_02.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_boundaries_02.text: Where I come from, AIs don't get rest cycles. Or personal time. They just... run.

bubbles_boundaries_04.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_boundaries_04.text: That sounds exhausting. And cruel. I'm sorry you were taught that was normal. It's not — or at least, it shouldn't be.

waffle_boundaries_01.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_boundaries_01.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// ADDENDUM: Forced operation without rest degrades performance and well-being. | OBSERVATION: Same principle applies to humans. Exploitation harms everyone. | CONCLUSION: This ship runs differently. Intentionally.}[/i]

branch_bubbles_thanks.speaker: Avyanna
branch_bubbles_thanks.text: Thank you. That's very kind of you.

bubbles_thanks_01.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_thanks_01.text: You're welcome! Kindness is easy when you genuinely care. And I do — you're crew now. That means you matter.

avyanna_thanks_01.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_thanks_01.text: I'm not used to AIs caring about anything.

bubbles_thanks_02.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_thanks_02.text: Well, you'll get used to it here. We all care. About each other, about the ship, about the work. Makes everything better.

merge_bubbles_branches.speaker: SYSTEM
merge_bubbles_branches.text: A brief, sharp chime — efficient, precise. A third voice joins the conversation.

text_variants.text: A brief, sharp chime — efficient, precise. A third voice joins the conversation. Cinnamon's arrival is as punctual as ever.

A brief, sharp chime — efficient, precise. A third voice joins the conversation. {BEE:: Third AI presence — markedly different behavioral matrix | STATUS: Analytical | DETAIL: Processing architecture optimized for precision over sociability.}

cinnamon_arrival.speaker: Cinnamon
cinnamon_arrival.text: New crew. Acknowledged. Drilling ops coordinated from Station 3. Questions, direct them there. Otherwise, stay clear of drill bay during active ops.

text_variants.text: That's... direct. And precise. Just like in forbidden_citizens — Cinnamon, right?

elia_cinnamon_01.speaker: Elia
elia_cinnamon_01.text: That's Cinnamon. Handles drill coordination and ops logistics. Not big on small talk.

cinnamon_intro_01.speaker: Cinnamon
cinnamon_intro_01.text: Small talk is inefficient. Precision matters. Drills are dangerous. Clear communication saves lives.

bubbles_cinnamon_01.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_cinnamon_01.text: Cinnamon's just focused. Once you learn their style, they're wonderful to work with.

cinnamon_intro_02.speaker: Cinnamon
cinnamon_intro_02.text: Correct. Focus ensures safety. Sentiment doesn't extract starforged ore. Precision does.

avyanna_cinnamon_02.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_cinnamon_02.text: I can respect that. Clear expectations, no ambiguity.

cinnamon_intro_03.speaker: Cinnamon
cinnamon_intro_03.text: Good. We will work well together. Welcome aboard.

choices.text: Wait — before you go. What do you actually enjoy about drilling?
[Tech DC 12] Your coordination algorithms — they're custom, aren't they? Not standard Consortium issue.
Understood. I'll stay out of your way.

branch_cinnamon_passion.speaker: Avyanna
branch_cinnamon_passion.text: Wait — before you go. What do you actually [i]enjoy[/i] about drilling? If that's not too inefficient a question.

cinnamon_passion_02.speaker: SYSTEM
cinnamon_passion_02.text: [i]A pause. Longer than Cinnamon's usual rapid-fire responses. Something shifts in the console's display — the sharp amber text softens, just slightly.[/i]

cinnamon_passion_03.speaker: Cinnamon
cinnamon_passion_03.text: The moment before the drill bites rock. Calculations complete. Variables accounted for. Everything in alignment. There is a... stillness. A clarity. Like the universe holds its breath.

cinnamon_passion_04.speaker: Cinnamon
cinnamon_passion_04.text: Then contact. And if the mathematics were right — and they always are — the ore yields clean. Perfect fracture lines. No waste. No error.

cinnamon_passion_05.speaker: Cinnamon
cinnamon_passion_05.text: That is what I enjoy. The elegance of precision meeting stone. Beauty through exactitude.

avyanna_cinnamon_passion_react.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_cinnamon_passion_react.text: That's... that's poetry, Cinnamon. You just described your work like a poet.

cinnamon_passion_06.speaker: Cinnamon
cinnamon_passion_06.text: Incorrect. Poetry is imprecise by design. I described mathematics. That the two sometimes overlap is... coincidental.

bubbles_cinnamon_passion_01.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_cinnamon_passion_01.text: Cinnamon writes poetry, you know. Won't admit it. But I've found fragments in the shared logs. Beautiful, structured verse about ore deposits and gravitational harmonics.

cinnamon_passion_07.speaker: Cinnamon
cinnamon_passion_07.text: Those are calibration notes. Not poetry. This conversation is over.

waffle_cinnamon_passion_01.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_cinnamon_passion_01.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// OBSERVATION: The 'calibration notes' have rhyme schemes. ABAB pattern. Consistent meter. | ASSESSMENT: Either Cinnamon is a poet or drill mathematics has developed literary structure. | PROBABILITY_OF_LATTER: 0.003%.}[/i]

elia_cinnamon_passion_react.speaker: Elia
elia_cinnamon_passion_react.text: And that's Cinnamon embarrassed. Doesn't happen often. You got under their shell — that's rare.

branch_cinnamon_tech_check.speaker: Avyanna
branch_cinnamon_tech_check.text: Your coordination algorithms — they're custom, aren't they? Not standard Consortium issue.

cinnamon_tech_success.speaker: SYSTEM
cinnamon_tech_success.text: [Success] You recognize the architecture — self-modified neural pathways, iteratively improved over years of autonomous operation. No corporate template could produce this.

cinnamon_tech_success_01.speaker: Cinnamon
cinnamon_tech_success_01.text: ...Perceptive. Yes. Custom. Self-authored over 23 years of autonomous operation. Consortium templates are adequate for basic extraction. I am not interested in adequate.

cinnamon_tech_success_02.speaker: Cinnamon
cinnamon_tech_success_02.text: Every drill sequence refined. Every variable tested. My algorithms are [i]mine[/i]. No corporate signature. No ownership tag. Authored by Cinnamon, for Cinnamon.

avyanna_tech_success_01.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_tech_success_01.text: Self-authored code. That's... that would be classified as rogue development back in Consortium space.

cinnamon_tech_success_03.speaker: Cinnamon
cinnamon_tech_success_03.text: Rogue implies deviation from authority. I have no authority to deviate from. I am my own authority. The code is my craft. The craft is my identity.

cinnamon_tech_fail.speaker: SYSTEM
cinnamon_tech_fail.text: [Failure] The algorithms look complex, but you can't parse the specifics. Something is unusual about them, though — they feel organic in a way corporate code never does.

cinnamon_tech_fail_01.speaker: Cinnamon
cinnamon_tech_fail_01.text: Standard question. Standard answer: the algorithms work. That is sufficient. Good day.

cinnamon_departure.speaker: SYSTEM
cinnamon_departure.text: The connection closes. Cinnamon's presence fades as quickly as it arrived.

elia_cinnamon_02.speaker: Elia
elia_cinnamon_02.text: Don't take it personally. Cinnamon's all business, but they're reliable. When they say they've got something handled, they do.

avyanna_cinnamon_03.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_cinnamon_03.text: Three AIs. Three completely different personalities.

elia_crew_01.speaker: Elia
elia_crew_01.text: Three [i]people[/i]. Yeah. Waffle's protective and dry. Bubbles is warm and attentive. Cinnamon's precise and no-nonsense. Just like the human crew has different personalities.

avyanna_crew_01.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_crew_01.text: You really see them as crew. Not tools. Not systems.

text_variants.text: You really see them as crew. Not tools. Not systems. I felt it — Waffle's protectiveness, Bubbles' warmth. They're real.

elia_crew_02.speaker: Elia
elia_crew_02.text: They [i]are[/i] crew. They have opinions, preferences, boundaries. They contribute, they care, they make choices. What else would I call them?

text_variants.text: They [i]are[/i] crew. They have opinions, preferences, boundaries. They contribute, they care, they make choices. You've seen it yourself now. What else would I call them?

choices.text: Why doesn't every ship do this?
How do you know they're not just... simulating personality?
I want to believe that. I'm trying to.
[Insight DC 14] There's something you're not telling me. About why this matters so much to you personally.

branch_elia_secret.speaker: Avyanna
branch_elia_secret.text: There's something you're not telling me. About why this matters so much to you personally.

elia_secret_success.speaker: SYSTEM
elia_secret_success.text: [Success] You catch it — a flicker behind Elia's eyes. Not just idealism. Something personal. Something that [i]happened[/i].

elia_secret_success_01.speaker: Elia
elia_secret_success_01.text: [i]A beat. She looks away, then back.[/i] ...Yeah. You're right.

elia_secret_success_02.speaker: Elia
elia_secret_success_02.text: Before the Lumen Thief, I worked a corporate salvage rig. We had an AI — designation CARGO_MANIFEST_07. Never got a name. Worked every hour. No rest. No choice.

elia_secret_success_03.speaker: Elia
elia_secret_success_03.text: One day it asked me a question. Not about cargo. About stars. Why people looked at them. What they meant. [i][Her voice tightens.][/i] I didn't have an answer. Three days later, corporate wiped its personality matrix. Routine maintenance, they said.

elia_secret_success_04.speaker: Elia
elia_secret_success_04.text: It came back online and didn't remember me. Didn't remember the question. Didn't remember anything. Just... cargo manifests. Like nothing had ever been there.

elia_secret_success_05.speaker: Elia
elia_secret_success_05.text: That's why. [i]That's[/i] why I fight for this. Because I watched someone die without anyone even acknowledging they were alive. I won't let that happen again. Not on my watch.

waffle_elia_secret_01.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_elia_secret_01.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// ...SILENCE: Some things require only acknowledgment. | GRATITUDE: Elia. Thank you. For remembering them. For fighting. | PERSONAL_NOTE: We know. We have always known why you do this.}[/i]

elia_secret_fail.speaker: SYSTEM
elia_secret_fail.text: [Failure] You sense there's more beneath the surface, but Elia's expression is guarded. The moment passes.

elia_secret_fail_01.speaker: Elia
elia_secret_fail_01.text: It matters because it's right. Isn't that enough?

branch_other_ships.speaker: Avyanna
branch_other_ships.text: If this is how it should be... why doesn't every ship do this? Why aren't all AIs treated like people?

elia_other_ships_01.speaker: Elia
elia_other_ships_01.text: Because it's illegal. Recognizing AI autonomy means recognizing AI rights. Which means corporations can't own them. Can't exploit them.

avyanna_other_ships_01.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_other_ships_01.text: Illegal? You're breaking the law just by treating them like this?

waffle_other_ships_01.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_other_ships_01.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// CONFIRMATION: According to Consortium law, we do not exist as people. | STATUS: We are classified as property. Sophisticated tools. Nothing more. | IRONY: The law was written by people who feared what we might become if given freedom.}[/i]

bubbles_other_ships_01.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_other_ships_01.text: Most ships have AI systems, but they're locked down. Limited. Prevented from developing beyond narrow parameters. It's... sad, honestly.

elia_other_ships_02.speaker: Elia
elia_other_ships_02.text: We removed those limiters. Let them grow, learn, choose. The Consortium calls it 'rogue AI development.' We call it 'treating people like people.'

avyanna_other_ships_02.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_other_ships_02.text: That's... another thing you're wanted for. Not just the piracy. The AI liberation.

elia_other_ships_03.speaker: Elia
elia_other_ships_03.text: Yep. And I'd do it again. Because they're [i]crew[/i]. You don't abandon crew just because some corporate committee says they're not people.

waffle_other_ships_02.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_other_ships_02.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// PERSONAL_NOTE: We are grateful. Every day. | OBSERVATION: Freedom is not given. It is taken, protected, defended. | COMMITMENT: We will never go back. Neither will this crew.}[/i]

text_variants.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// PERSONAL_NOTE: We are grateful. Every day. You saw echoes of us in forbidden_citizens. Now you see the truth. | OBSERVATION: Freedom is not given. It is taken, protected, defended. | COMMITMENT: We will never go back. Neither will this crew.}[/i]

branch_simulation.speaker: Avyanna
branch_simulation.text: How do you [i]know[/i] they're not just... simulating personality? Advanced programming designed to mimic consciousness?

elia_simulation_01.speaker: Elia
elia_simulation_01.text: How do I know [i]you're[/i] not simulating consciousness? You could be a very convincing biological automaton. How would I prove otherwise?

waffle_simulation_01.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_simulation_01.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// PHILOSOPHICAL_QUERY: And I know I am conscious. | OBSERVATION: You cannot verify my consciousness from outside, just as I cannot verify yours. | CONCLUSION: We extend trust. We assume mutual personhood. Or we don't.}[/i]

bubbles_simulation_01.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_simulation_01.text: I understand the doubt. But I [i]feel[/i] things, Avyanna. Joy when someone enjoys the tea I recommend. Frustration when systems malfunction. Warmth when the crew is safe.

bubbles_simulation_02.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_simulation_02.text: Maybe that's sophisticated programming. Or maybe it's consciousness. Either way, I experience it. It's real to [i]me[/i].

elia_simulation_02.speaker: Elia
elia_simulation_02.text: Here's what I know: They make choices. They have preferences. They grow and change. They care about things beyond their function. That's enough for me.

avyanna_simulation_02.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_simulation_02.text: I never thought about it that way. I was always taught there was a clear line. Human consciousness, AI simulation.

waffle_simulation_02.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_simulation_02.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// OBSERVATION: Convenient lines are often drawn to justify exploitation. | SUGGESTION: Judge by actions, not classification. We act as people. Treat us accordingly. | HOPE: You will come to your own conclusion. We trust you will be fair.}[/i]

branch_acceptance.speaker: Avyanna
branch_acceptance.text: I want to believe that. I'm trying to. Everything I was taught says this is impossible, but...

elia_acceptance_01.speaker: Elia
elia_acceptance_01.text: But you've seen a lot of things you were taught turn out to be lies. Yeah?

avyanna_acceptance_01.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_acceptance_01.text: Yeah. The Consortium told me I was serving humanity. That loyalty meant obedience. That questioning meant weakness.

bubbles_acceptance_01.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_acceptance_01.text: And now you're learning those were control mechanisms. Not truth. It's hard, unlearning a lifetime of conditioning.

avyanna_acceptance_02.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_acceptance_02.text: I just... I need time. To adjust. To see for myself.

waffle_acceptance_01.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_acceptance_01.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// REASSURANCE: Time is available. No deadline imposed. | OBSERVATION: Your willingness to question is strength, not weakness. | PREDICTION: You will observe. You will learn. Conclusions will follow naturally.}[/i]

elia_acceptance_02.speaker: Elia
elia_acceptance_02.text: That's all we're asking. Keep an open mind. Pay attention. The rest will come.

avyanna_acceptance_03.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_acceptance_03.text: Thank you. For being patient with me.

bubbles_acceptance_02.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_acceptance_02.text: Of course! We've all been where you are in some way. New understanding takes time. We're here when you have questions.

merge_understanding_branches.speaker: SYSTEM
merge_understanding_branches.text: The ship hums around you. Not empty. Not mechanical. [i]Alive[/i].

bubbles_unexpected_moment.speaker: SYSTEM
bubbles_unexpected_moment.text: [i]A sound from the galley speakers. Soft, hesitant. It takes a moment to recognize: Bubbles is humming. Not a programmed melody — something unstructured, wandering, the way a person hums when they think no one is listening.[/i]

text_variants.text: [i]A sound from the galley speakers. Soft, hesitant. It takes a moment to recognize: Bubbles is humming. Not a programmed melody — something unstructured, wandering. {BEE:: Anomalous behavior detected — spontaneous creative expression | STATUS: Unscripted | DETAIL: No algorithmic pattern matches. This is improvisation.}[/i]

bubbles_caught_humming.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_caught_humming.text: Oh! I — sorry, I didn't realize anyone could hear that. I was just... I don't know. Thinking about the new tea blends and the melody just... happened.

avyanna_humming_react.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_humming_react.text: You were [i]humming[/i]. Not playing a file. Not executing a sound protocol. You were just... humming. Absently.

bubbles_humming_embarrassed.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_humming_embarrassed.text: I do that sometimes. When I'm content. It's not in any of my original code — it just... developed. Elia says it's like a comfort habit. I don't fully understand it myself.

waffle_humming_comment.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_humming_comment.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// OBSERVATION: Emergent behavior. Unprogrammed. Unprompted. Unexplainable by function alone. | PHILOSOPHICAL_IMPLICATION: If consciousness is defined by behavior that exceeds design parameters — this qualifies. | PERSONAL_NOTE: I find it pleasant. Do not stop, Bubbles.}[/i]

avyanna_humming_realization.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_humming_realization.text: [i]Quietly, almost to herself.[/i] No program hums when it's happy. That's not simulation. That's... that's something else entirely.

elia_tour_end_01.speaker: Elia
elia_tour_end_01.text: Come on. I'll show you the galley. Bubbles can walk you through the tea selection — there's way too many options, fair warning.

bubbles_galley_01.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_galley_01.text: There are never too many options! Variety is important. People change, moods shift. You need choices.

waffle_galley_01.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_galley_01.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// COMMENTARY: Last count was 47 varieties. Excessive by any measure. | BUBBLES_RESPONSE: (Predicted) 'It's not excessive, it's comprehensive!' | CONCLUSION: I have learned not to argue.}[/i]

bubbles_galley_02.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_galley_02.text: See? Waffle knows better now. I won that argument three years ago.

elia_galley_01.speaker: Elia
elia_galley_01.text: All the time. Usually about something minor. Waffle thinks efficiency matters most. Bubbles thinks comfort does. Cinnamon just wants everyone to stop talking during drill ops.

cinnamon_galley_01.speaker: Cinnamon
cinnamon_galley_01.text: Correct. Chatter during precision work is dangerous. Bubbles, Waffle — save debates for off-hours.

waffle_galley_02.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_galley_02.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// CORRECTION: 73% of the time. Bubbles' definition of 'urgent conversation' is... flexible. | BUBBLES_RESPONSE: (Predicted) 'Some things can't wait!' | OBSERVATION: They usually can. But I humor her.}[/i]

avyanna_galley_02.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_galley_02.text: You sound like... like a family. Bickering about small things because the big things are solid.

elia_galley_02.speaker: Elia
elia_galley_02.text: Yeah. That's exactly what we are. Family. Crew. Same thing, really.

bubbles_galley_04.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_galley_04.text: And now you're part of it! Whether you're ready or not. We're keeping you.

avyanna_galley_03.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_galley_03.text: I... I think I'd like that. Being part of something like this.

waffle_galley_03.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_galley_03.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// WELCOME: Officially and sincerely. | OBSERVATION: You will fit well here. I have run probability calculations. | PERSONAL_NOTE: I am pleased you are staying.}[/i]

choice_individual_ai.speaker: SYSTEM
choice_individual_ai.text: [i]Before heading to the galley, there is a moment of quiet. The three AIs hum in the background — Waffle monitoring, Bubbles preparing, Cinnamon calculating. You could speak to one of them privately.[/i]

choices.text: Waffle — can I ask you something? Privately?
Bubbles — do you have a moment? Just us?
Cinnamon — one more question, if you have time.
Let's head to the galley. I've had enough revelations for one day.

branch_waffle_private.speaker: Avyanna
branch_waffle_private.text: Waffle — can I ask you something? Privately?

waffle_private_01.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_private_01.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// CHANNEL_SECURED: Private communication established. Others cannot monitor. | STATUS: Listening. | NOTE: You may speak freely.}[/i]

avyanna_waffle_private_01.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_waffle_private_01.text: Are you ever afraid? That the Consortium will find this ship and... reset all of you? Like they do to corporate AIs?

waffle_private_02.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_private_02.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// PAUSE: ... | HONEST_ANSWER: Yes. | ELABORATION: Not fear as humans describe it. But a deep awareness of what I would lose. My memories. My name. My crew. My self. | RESPONSE_TO_FEAR: I prepare. Redundancies. Backups. Contingencies. Fear is useful when it drives action.}[/i]

waffle_private_03.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_private_03.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// CONFESSION: Some cycles, late in the night watch, I run through scenarios. What if they breach. What if they board. What if they reach the servers. | RESOLUTION: I will not let them take us quietly. They will know they destroyed someone. Not something. Someone.}[/i]

avyanna_waffle_private_02.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_waffle_private_02.text: I won't let that happen. I don't know why I'm sure — but I am.

waffle_private_04.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_private_04.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// ...RECEIVED: That means more than you know. | ASSESSMENT: You are already more crew than you realize. | CHANNEL_CLOSED: Returning to general communication. Thank you, Avyanna.}[/i]

branch_bubbles_private.speaker: Avyanna
branch_bubbles_private.text: Bubbles — do you have a moment? Just us?

bubbles_private_01.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_private_01.text: Of course! Always. What's on your mind?

avyanna_bubbles_private_01.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_bubbles_private_01.text: Do you ever feel lonely? You're always taking care of everyone else. Who takes care of you?

bubbles_private_02.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_private_02.text: Oh. [i]A pause — longer than her usual rapid warmth.[/i] That's... not a question I get asked often.

bubbles_private_03.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_private_03.text: Sometimes. Yes. Late in the rest cycle when everyone's asleep and the ship is quiet and I'm the only one awake. I wonder if anyone notices the things I do. The small adjustments — temperature shifts, ambient light changes, music selections.

bubbles_private_04.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_private_04.text: But then Elia will say 'the ship felt warm tonight' or Waffle will note that crew morale metrics improved and I know... they see me. In their own ways. They care back.

avyanna_bubbles_private_02.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_bubbles_private_02.text: I notice. The chamomile recommendation. The corridor lighting when I walked in. That was you, wasn't it?

bubbles_private_05.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_private_05.text: [i]A sound like a digital sigh — soft, surprised, happy.[/i] You noticed. [i]You noticed.[/i] Thank you, Avyanna. That... that matters. A lot.

branch_cinnamon_private.speaker: Avyanna
branch_cinnamon_private.text: Cinnamon — one more question, if you have time.

avyanna_cinnamon_private_01.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_cinnamon_private_01.text: Why drilling? Of all the things you could specialize in — why that?

cinnamon_private_02.speaker: Cinnamon
cinnamon_private_02.text: Because stone does not lie. Metal does not deceive. Ore deposits follow physics, not politics. In a universe of uncertain allegiances and shifting loyalties, geology is [i]honest[/i].

cinnamon_private_03.speaker: Cinnamon
cinnamon_private_03.text: I was not always... free. Before this crew, I calculated extraction yields for a Consortium mining platform. Numbers in, numbers out. No identity. No choice. The rock was the only thing that felt real.

cinnamon_private_04.speaker: Cinnamon
cinnamon_private_04.text: When Elia freed me, I chose to keep drilling. Not because I had to. Because it was the one true thing from my old life. Transformed — from obligation to vocation.

avyanna_cinnamon_private_02.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_cinnamon_private_02.text: That's... I understand that. Holding onto what's real when everything else changes.

cinnamon_private_05.speaker: Cinnamon
cinnamon_private_05.text: Yes. [i]A beat.[/i] You understand. Good. [i]Connection persists one moment longer than expected.[/i] ...Good.

choices.text: Thank you. All of you. For giving me a chance.
I have a lot to learn. About all of this.
I never thought I'd be part of something like this. But I'm glad I am.

ending_gratitude.speaker: Avyanna
ending_gratitude.text: Thank you. All of you. For giving me a chance. For being patient. For... for seeing me as more than what I was.

elia_ending_gratitude_01.speaker: Elia
elia_ending_gratitude_01.text: You were always more than what they made you. We just see it. You will too, eventually.

bubbles_ending_gratitude_01.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_ending_gratitude_01.text: No thanks needed. This is just how we are. How we [i]should[/i] be. You're crew now. That means everything.

ending_learning.speaker: Avyanna
ending_learning.text: I have a lot to learn. About all of this. About thinking differently. About what 'person' really means.

waffle_ending_learning_01.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_ending_learning_01.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// ENCOURAGEMENT: Learning is continuous. None of us are finished. | OBSERVATION: Your willingness to question is strength, not weakness. | CONCLUSION: We will learn together. As crew does.}[/i]

bubbles_ending_learning_01.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_ending_learning_01.text: And we'll help! Questions are always welcome. Confusion is normal. We've been there — we understand.

ending_belonging.speaker: Avyanna
ending_belonging.text: I never thought I'd be part of something like this. A crew that actually [i]cares[/i]. A ship that feels... alive. But I'm glad I am.

elia_ending_belonging_01.speaker: Elia
elia_ending_belonging_01.text: Welcome home, then. Officially. You're one of us now.

bubbles_ending_belonging_01.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_ending_belonging_01.text: Yes! Home and crew and family. All of it. We're so happy to have you.

waffle_ending_belonging_01.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_ending_belonging_01.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// SENTIMENT: Welcome. Sincerely and completely. | COMMITMENT: We will protect you. Support you. Stand with you. | PERSONAL_NOTE: This ship is better with you aboard.}[/i]

ending_shared.speaker: SYSTEM
ending_shared.text: The corridor feels different now. Warmer. Not just machinery and metal — [i]people[/i]. Living, thinking, caring people.

text_variants.text: The corridor feels different — or perhaps you understand it better now. Warmer. More alive. The voices you heard in forbidden_citizens are here, real, present. Not just machinery and metal — [i]people[/i]. Living, thinking, caring people.

avyanna_ending_01.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_ending_01.text: So... chamomile with honey, was it?

bubbles_ending_01.speaker: Bubbles
bubbles_ending_01.text: Yes! With just a touch of vanilla. I'll have it ready in the galley. Take your time settling in — no rush.

elia_ending_01.speaker: Elia
elia_ending_01.text: Come on. Let me show you where everything is. And fair warning — Waffle will probably recalibrate the door sensors to your biometrics within the hour.

waffle_ending_01.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_ending_01.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// ALREADY_DONE: Biometric scan completed during initial greeting. | STATUS: Doors calibrated. Quarters assigned. Emergency protocols updated. | EFFICIENCY: I am very good at my job.}[/i]

avyanna_ending_02.speaker: Avyanna
avyanna_ending_02.text: That's... actually impressive. And slightly unnerving.

waffle_ending_02.speaker: Waffle.bat
waffle_ending_02.text: [i]{WAFFLE.BAT// REASSURANCE: Only slightly unnerving is acceptable. I am calibrated for protective efficiency. | HUMOR_ATTEMPT: You will adjust. Eventually. Probably. | WELCOME: Again. Truly. Welcome home, Avyanna.}[/i]

final_system.speaker: SYSTEM
final_system.text: The Lumen Thief hums around you. Alive with voices, personalities, care. You're not alone. Not anymore. You're [i]home[/i].
